title: Revert "Update entrypoint behaviour to match docker"
body:
This reverts commit 15e1054820a0442ce179ca44ddd870b8ff56fa8c.

The original commit changed entrypoint behaviour in `buildah run` to match `docker run`. This breaks the desired state of `buildah run` command line behaviour matching `buildah bud RUN` (Dockerfile) behaviour.

To achieve `docker run` entrypoint behaviour, `podman run` should be used.

Fixes #607

Signed-off-by: pixdrift <support@pixeldrift.net>

comments.body: Failure was due to problem pulling Fedora image from registry. Can I get the CI re-run? 😄
@rhatdan, cheers for the re-run, looks good to go.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably b16a1ea) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Opened new PR #614. This PR was initially just a straight revert of the previous commit. New commit only reverts changes in run.go without modifying tests.
